name: Sugar Free Whipped Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dry milk and cold water in a bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Beat the mixture at high speed until stiff peaks form (about 4 minutes).
3. Add lemon juice to the whipped mixture and continue beating at high speed for an additional 4 minutes.
4. Stir sugar and equivalent-sugar substitute together, then gradually add them to the whipped topping while continuing to beat at high speed.
5. Mix in vanilla extract until well combined.
6. Refrigerate until ready to use. This topping is best served immediately before it loses its volume.
(Note: 1 serving = 2 Tablespoons; exchanges = Free (1/3 cup is considered a Vegetable exchange); calories=12)
